MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Mr. Horn represented to the court that co-defendant Ms. Jones was too ill to come to court due to leukemia and a high fever. Court has not stricken the request for jury trial, however; the court does require a Doctor's note be submitted to the Trial Department in support of her absence today.
